Title: LK (Instrumental Mix)
Notes: Warm Brazilian lift; establish movement without announcing the darkness

Title: Together
Notes: Bright rolling momentum and an easy first blend

Title: Be True
Notes: Soulful but more nocturnal; first hint of the descent

Title: Mr Majestic
Notes: Keeps the groove musical while adding weight

Title: True Romance
Notes: Vocals stay warm while the bassline turns inward

Title: Pulp Fiction
Notes: Stripped-back menace; pivot from liquid into classic Headz pressure

Title: Metropolis Revisited
Notes: Cinematic transition with more machinery in the drums

Title: Mutant Jazz (Rollers Instinct Remix)
Notes: Jazz DNA remains, but the room is now visibly darker

Title: Morning Light
Notes: Last major emotional release before the set hardens

Title: The Warning
Notes: Long-form tension builder; let this one breathe

Title: Skylab
Notes: Cold sci-fi pressure and a clear shift into the second half

Title: Bacteria
Notes: Mechanical funk with no sunlight left

Title: Pacman (Ram Trilogy Remix)
Notes: Sharper attack and relentless forward motion

Title: Messiah
Notes: Apocalyptic scale; the set stops pretending to be friendly

Title: Can't Punish Me
Notes: Relentless Moving Shadow pressure; prepare the final descent
